content:
# Socials And Contact

## Best ways to reach James
- **Email:** YouCanAlwaysReachJames@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/jamesworkswell
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/jamesalmeida
- **Phone:** 408.427.1492

If you're reaching out about consulting, product work, or AI implementation, email is the most direct option.

If you want, I can also tell you **what kinds of projects James is best suited for** before you reach out.
